EventHandler.Name: DomesticCurrency
EventHandler.Response: OrderShipmentsDomesticCurrency( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoNum=P(CoNum), CoLine=P(CoLine), CoiStat=P(CoiStat), CoCustNum=P(CoCustNum), CadrName=P(CadrName), CoType=P(CoType), CoRelease=P(CoRelease), DerQtyShippedConv=P(DerQtyShippedConv), DerPriceConv=P(DerPriceConv), DerTotPrice=P(DerTotPrice), CadrCurrCode=P(CoCurrCode), CoExchRate=P(CoExchRate)) )

EventHandler.Name: GotoTrackingNumberURL
EventHandler.Response: SLCoShips.GetShipmentTrackingURLSp( PARMS(VAR P(ShipmentId), VAR P(TrackingNumber), RVAR V(TrackingNumberURL)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.LoadJSONVar( PARMS(VAR OrderShipments, RVAR V(JSONVarNotInterpretWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR OrderShipments, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) )

Variable.Name: cvw_FeatureControllerEdit
Variable.Value: Visible:#C(ShipmentLineEdit), #GV(IsRS7221ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ShipmentLineGridCol), #GV(IsRS7221ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ShipmentSeqEdit), #GV(IsRS7221ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ShipmentSeqGridCol), #GV(IsRS7221ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ShipmentLineStatic), #GV(IsRS7221ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ShipmentSeqStatic), #GV(IsRS7221ActiveVar) = "1", "True"

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If qtyToApprove < minQtyToApprove Or qtyToApprove > maxQtyToApprove Then
